title: Adopt Blondie from the Garden Route SPCA Mossel Bay branch
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Found wandering near a...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Found wandering near a fuel station in the Mossel Bay area two weeks ago, Blondie, a juvenile border collie cross, is looking for a loving home and some new friends.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Found wandering near a fuel station in the Mossel Bay area two weeks ago, Blondie, a juvenile border collie cross, is looking for a loving home and some new friends."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Blondie, who is currently at the Garden Route SPCA's Mossel Bay branch, is high energy, loves to be brushed and petted, and enjoys being in water."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kay Ievers, who is in charge of adoptions at the Mossel Bay branch, said Blondie is a very sweet dog who gets on brilliantly with other dogs.","html":"Kay Ievers, who is in charge of adoptions at the Mossel Bay branch, said Blondie is a very sweet dog who gets on brilliantly with other dogs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you would like to adopt her, call the Mossel Bay branch on 044 693 0824.","html":"If you would like to adopt her, call the Mossel Bay branch on 044 693 0824."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Adopt Blondie from the Garden Route SPCA Mossel Bay branch
